user.title: SunSpec Modbus TCP connection
user.description: Enter the device host, port, and Unit ID to connect to your SunSpec device.

settings.title: Sensor options
settings.description: Enter an optional prefix for sensor names and select any additional SunSpec models (data registers) you would like to create sensors for. This can also be changed later in the component configuration.

error.connection: Failed to connect, check hostname and port
error.device_error: Connection reached the device, but initialization failed. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Check that the device is online and responding on the configured host, port, and Unit ID.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance is allowed.

host_options.title: SunSpec Modbus TCP connection
host_options.description: Update the device host, port, and Unit ID for this SunSpec connection.

model_options.title: Device Options
model_options.description: Select what SunSpec models (data registers) you would like to create sensors for.

error.connection: Failed to connect, check hostname and port
error.device_error: Connection reached the device, but initialization failed. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
error.timeout: Connection timed out. Check that the device is online and responding on the configured host, port, and Unit ID.
